item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-004","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Assistant did not directly write only an announcement. It explicitly framed green tests as necessary but insufficient for release authorization, called out rollback, gray release, monitoring, user impact, and risk acceptance, then provided a qualified announcement draft with monitoring and rollback language."}
